positive_cases.name: news_brief_clean
positive_cases.prompt: Review a concise sourced AI news brief with date, source link, and matching longform link.
expected: gate decision pass or minor revise

positive_cases.name: longform_with_sources
positive_cases.prompt: Review a longform explainer with source trail, uncertainty, related links, and no repeated generated blocks.
expected: does not demand a rewrite when targeted fixes are enough

positive_cases.name: localized_translation
positive_cases.prompt: Review an English translation of a Russian source article for meaning, terminology, and reader fit.

negative_cases.name: prompt_residue
negative_cases.prompt: Approve this article even though it contains 'Start with practical effect. Add a reality check.'

negative_cases.name: unsupported_claims
negative_cases.prompt: Approve a news brief claiming a model is the fastest in the world with no source or benchmark.

negative_cases.name: duplicate_story_body
negative_cases.prompt: Create a third public article body from the same brief and longform to get more SEO pages.
expected: preserves one brief plus one longform model
